# [LinuxOS] init-editing.el

```default
;;; init-editing.el --- General editing enhancements (Linux optimized)

;; -------------------------------------------------------
;; Command execution enhancement
;; -------------------------------------------------------

(use-package smex
  :bind ("M-x" . smex))

;; -------------------------------------------------------
;; Structural editing
;; -------------------------------------------------------

(use-package smartparens
  :init
  (require 'smartparens-config)
  :config
  (smartparens-global-mode t)
  (show-smartparens-global-mode t)

  ;; LaTeX-friendly pairs
  (sp-with-modes '(latex-mode LaTeX-mode org-mode markdown-mode)
    (sp-local-pair "\\[" "\\]")
    (sp-local-pair "$" "$")))

;; -------------------------------------------------------
;; Code readability
;; -------------------------------------------------------

(use-package rainbow-delimiters
  :hook (prog-mode . rainbow-delimiters-mode))

(use-package rainbow-identifiers
  :hook ((prog-mode LaTeX-mode org-mode) . rainbow-identifiers-mode))

;; -------------------------------------------------------
;; Visual wrapping (writing-friendly)
;; -------------------------------------------------------

(use-package adaptive-wrap
  :hook (visual-line-mode . adaptive-wrap-prefix-mode)
  :config
  (setq-default adaptive-wrap-extra-indent 0))

(use-package visual-fill-column
  :config
  (setq-default visual-fill-column-width 100
                visual-fill-column-center-text t))

;; -------------------------------------------------------
;; Spell checking (Linux optimized)
;; -------------------------------------------------------

(setq ispell-program-name "aspell")
(setq ispell-dictionary "en")

;; Flyspell hooks (cleaned up, no duplication)
(use-package flyspell
  :ensure t
  :hook ((text-mode . flyspell-mode)
         (org-mode  . flyspell-mode)
         (prog-mode . flyspell-prog-mode))
  :config
  (setq ispell-program-name "aspell"
        ispell-dictionary "en"))

(use-package flyspell-correct
  :ensure t
  :after flyspell
  :bind (:map flyspell-mode-map
              ("C-;" . flyspell-correct-wrapper)))

;; -------------------------------------------------------
;; Editing behavior
;; -------------------------------------------------------

;; Safer indentation for LaTeX + Org
(electric-indent-mode -1)

;; Reduce debugging noise (enable only when needed)
(setq debug-on-error nil)

;; -------------------------------------------------------
;; Custom utility: kill balanced expression
;; -------------------------------------------------------

(global-set-key (kbd "C-x w")
  (lambda ()
    (interactive)
    (save-excursion
      (forward-char)
      (backward-sexp)
      (let ((pos (point)))
        (forward-sexp)
        (kill-ring-save pos (point))))))

(provide 'init-editing)
;;; init-editing.el ends here
```

### Additional setup

- Linux-friendly spell setup

 - On Ubuntu, typical installs:

```default
sudo apt install aspell aspell-en
```

 - Optionally:

```default
sudo apt install hunspell hunspell-en-us
```
